findings.title: Algorithm confusion: jwt.Parse accepts a token signed with a key type the caller did not expect, enabling signature bypass
findings.reachability_note: Reachable: internal/webhooks/stripe.go calls jwt.Parse on the X-Internal-Token header to authorize the webhook write path. The vulnerable verifier is on a live code path, so 'we don't use that function' does not apply.
findings.fix: Upgrade to github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v4 >= 4.4.3 (or v5) and pin the expected signing method via jwt.WithValidMethods.
findings.source: performing-sca-dependency-scanning-with-snyk (Output Format: CVE / CVSS / Exploit maturity / Fix / Path; Reachable Vulnerability)
